name: Temporal
description: Time vocabulary. Tick is a unit of discrete time. THEN orders one concept after another. AT is a general locative — historically temporal (X AT Tick), now relaxed to Concept→Concept so other vocabularies can reuse it (e.g. Position AT Index from bundle-cards). Temporaneous marks anything whose State evolves over time; the Temporaneous HAS a State, and the State AT a Tick. Build chains of States across Ticks to model how something changes moment-to-moment.
